mapper.select: select id, batch_id as batchId, group_id as groupId, original_file_name as originalFileName, file_ext as fileExt, file_size as fileSize, parse_status as parseStatus, readiness_status as readinessStatus, recommended_group_id as recommendedGroupId, recommended_action as recommendedAction, readiness_score as readinessScore, readiness_grade as readinessGrade, parseable, chunk_count as chunkCount, avg_chunk_length as avgChunkLength, short_chunk_count as shortChunkCount, long_chunk_count as longChunkCount, empty_chunk_count as emptyChunkCount, duplicate_chunk_count as duplicateChunkCount, duplicate_document_id as duplicateDocumentId, issue_count as issueCount, analysis_summary as analysisSummary, failure_reason as failureReason, imported_document_id as importedDocumentId, decision_reason as decisionReason, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from document_readiness_items where batch_id = #{batchId} order by id asc

select id, batch_id as batchId, group_id as groupId, original_file_name as originalFileName, file_ext as fileExt, file_size as fileSize, content_type as contentType, file_hash as fileHash, storage_bucket as storageBucket, storage_object_key as storageObjectKey, parse_status as parseStatus, readiness_status as readinessStatus, recommended_group_id as recommendedGroupId, recommended_action as recommendedAction, readiness_score as readinessScore, readiness_grade as readinessGrade, parseable, chunk_count as chunkCount, avg_chunk_length as avgChunkLength, short_chunk_count as shortChunkCount, long_chunk_count as longChunkCount, empty_chunk_count as emptyChunkCount, duplicate_chunk_count as duplicateChunkCount, duplicate_document_id as duplicateDocumentId, issue_count as issueCount, analysis_summary as analysisSummary, failure_reason as failureReason, approved_by_user_id as approvedByUserId, approved_at as approvedAt, imported_document_id as importedDocumentId, decision_reason as decisionReason, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from document_readiness_items where batch_id = #{batchId} and imported_document_id is null and readiness_status in ('RECOMMENDED', 'APPROVED') and recommended_action in ('IMPORT_TO_TARGET_GROUP', 'IMPORT_TO_RECOMMENDED_GROUP') order by id asc
